author: Patricia Sokolowski
text: Giuseppe was very knowledgeable and thorugh. I called him and just by explaining my problem he knew ezactly what it was. He was out within the hour and the problem was fixed very fast. I would for sure recommend him to anyone with plumbing issues.  thank you again.

author: Jason Kell
text: Best in the business!! We have been using Maranto's for several years now . He has affordable pricing and the work is TOP QUALITY. Trust his word and he has Very honest pricing. If you have found this review there is no need to keep looking for a company. I promise just save yourself the hassle and call Maranto's today!!

author: Michael Francis
text: Hands down the best around! Very professional, clean and organized. Takes pride in ensuring plumbing is working perfectly, and cleans up after the job is done. Hire them you won't be disappointed.

author: Rainy Flores
text: Giuseppe was very professional came to fix our hose bib replacement I recommend him to everyone 🙂

author: Ryan Balfanz
text: Recommend the sewer services as well as the water services

author: Damian Swierbutowskii
text: Great people to do business with. Very fast response and got the job done the next day. Called 3 places and Giuseppe was the first one to respond with exact details. Next time won't call anyone else. Thanks for the awesome work!!

author: Daryl Palumbo O'Leary
text: Giuseppe installed our back-up sump. He was on time, very professional and knowledgeable, and fair. Great job and I highly recommend. Five-star service
